name: chain_i_built_a_side_hustle_turning_ugly_sprea
method: i built a side hustle turning ugly spreadsheets into dashboards for local businesses

stages.task: Find local businesses with public ugly spreadsheets/reports (Google Sheets links, PDF reports, messy website tables)
Auto-convert raw data into clean plotly/streamlit dashboard with 3 template styles
Cold email business owner with before/after screenshot, link to hosted sample dashboard
